title: BND Mine Special
description: DLC mod created for BND Mine Modpack but you can use him on your Modpack.
body:
DLC for Modpack: BND Mine Origins

This mod adds the ability to get a VIP item and a VIP axe in your world, this axe is quite good compared to the netherite axe, it is better.
Also, this axe can be used as a weapon, the ability to put enchantment on it has been added: sharpness. BND Luck's own enchantment was also added by itself, but it does nothing for beauty.
and the most important thing is that this mod does not affect your FPS in the game at all.
